data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted in transit using industry-standard SSL/TLS protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2 and 1.3 are supported to ensure secure connections.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Strong authentication measures are enforced for user login.
data.technical_spec: Incorporation of OAuth 2.0 for secure API authentication and authorization.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: WAF protects the site from various web-based attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS WAF is configured with custom rules for threat mitigation.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Systems are monitored for suspicious activities with a centralized SIEM.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using Splunk for real-time security insights.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and patching are conducted.
data.technical_spec: Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) is employed.
